entries.title: Resident IPC must remain authoritative in release topology
entries.rationale: Release artifacts must not silently fall back to the legacy process runner.

entries.title: State compatibility fixtures must pass before release promotion
entries.rationale: Receipts, task state, memory state, and assimilation artifacts need explicit upgrade and rollback coverage.

entries.title: Broader assimilation surface remains experimental outside the frozen v1 slice
entries.rationale: Only the v1 vertical slice is hardened for closure evidence; other assimilation lanes must not be implied as production supported.
